alerts.title: Freya Skye Upgrades Sydney and Melbourne Venues for 'Stars Align Tour' Dates
alerts.description: Due to presale ticket demand for ​Freya Skye's Australian 'Stars Align Tour,' venues have been upgraded for the Sydney and Melbourne stops this June. ​General on sale for all shows commences Friday 27 February, 3pm local time.
